ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Zero Stage", NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ), $Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c,
NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'PROFILE: Integration')), NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'System Administrator')),
RecordType.Name <> 'Informatics', RecordType.Name <> 'Service Contract', RecordType.Name <> 'Project Farma',
AND (ISBLANK(Reason_Lost_Detail__c), OR(ISPICKVAL( StageName ,'Closed Won'),ISPICKVAL( StageName ,'Closed Lost'))))
/*
AND( PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Zero Stage", NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ), $Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, $Profile.Name <> 'DAS After Market Inside Sales User', NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'PROFILE: Integration')), NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'Application Integration profiles')), NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'System Administrator')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'scrumteam-boston')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'nicolle.mantia')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'catherine.holland')),
RecordType.Name <> 'Informatics', RecordType.Name <> 'Service Contract',
AND (ISBLANK(Reason_Lost_Detail__c), OR(ISPICKVAL( StageName ,'Closed Won'),ISPICKVAL( StageName ,'Closed Lost'))))
--------
AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, $Profile.Name <> 'DAS After Market Inside Sales User', NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'Application Integration profiles')), NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'System Administrator')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'scrumteam-boston')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'nicolle.mantia')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'catherine.holland')),
RecordType.Name <> 'Informatics', RecordType.Name <> 'Dx Record Type', RecordType.Name <> 'Dx EMEA Record Type',
AND (ISBLANK(Reason_Lost_Detail__c), OR(ISPICKVAL( StageName ,'Closed Won'),ISPICKVAL( StageName ,'Closed Lost')))) && $Profile.Name <> 'Dealer' */
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_046: Please fill "Closed Reason Detail" field.
